characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Nancy is a widow who turns to drug dealing when she can't support her family on her own. Then things get worse... Anti-Villain: Flip-flops between this and being anAnti-Hero- she is a drug dealer, yes, but a lot of the people she's in opposition against are much worse and she's only really in this for the money. Cartwright Curse: If you marry Nancy you will die, simple as that. Everyone Has Standards: She makes it clear that her product will never be sold to children. I Just Want to Be Normal: Subverted. She keepssayingshe wants a normal life for her family but does nothing to achieve it. In fact, she plunges back into the drug dealing life at the first opportunity whenever she's pushed away from it.

characters.name: The Botwin Family
characters.description: Nancy is a widow who turns to drug dealing when she can't support her family on her own. Then things get worse... Cartwright Curse: If you marry Nancy you will die, simple as that. Everyone Has Standards: She makes it clear that her product will never be sold to children. I Just Want to Be Normal: Subverted. characters.name: The Hodes
characters.description: Abusive Parent: Isabelle gets the worst of it. Celia's own mother was not very great either. The Alcoholic/Lady Drunk: Shane points this out during her campaign to make Agrestic a drug-free neighborhood. Butt-Monkey: A cheating husband, getting cancer, going to prison, being openly hated by her kids. Things rarely go right for Celia. She'd be sympathetic if she weren't such a colossalJerkass. Deadpan Snarker: Passive-aggressively snarks at her own daughter for her weight and everyone else for whatever else she feels a need to comment on. Jerkass: Celia is a bitch, plain and simple. Yet she manages to be one of the show's most popular side characters due in no small part to how horrible she is.

characters.name: Other Agrestic Residents
characters.description: Crouching Moron, Hidden Badass: He does a lot of idiotic things, from stealing, committing fraud, etc. However, when he gets dangerous,he gets dangerous. Genius Ditz: He may make a lot of stupid decisions, but he's a very competent accountant. Incompatible Orientation: Quite possibly. His wife Dana supposedly hated sex but loved him as a person, implying she may be asexual. Jerkass: Like many of his neighbors, he's pretty smug and can be mean-spirited. Jerk with a Heart of Gold: Occasionally will show a nicer side every once in a while.

characters.name: Miscellaneous characters (seasons 1-3)
characters.description: Only Sane Man: He sometimes plays this role to the other characters. She Is Not My Girlfriend: Constantly had to tell U-Turn and his cronies that he was not in a relationship with Nancy. UST: Quite often with Nancy, culminating with them kissing at one point and later on,starting a relationship in season 3. Where da White Women At?: He slept with Celia once and has a lot of chemistry with Nancy. Conrad's aunt and Nancy's chief supplier.

characters.name: The Cartel
characters.description: Big Bad: In Season 6. Bus Crash: He'sKilled Offscreenin jail during theTime Skipbetween Seasons 6 and 7. Sleazy Politician: He's the mayor of Tiajuana and also a drug dealer. The Dragon: He's Reyes' right hand man.
